faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Astoria homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and sewage systems. In Astoria's older buildings, aging plumbing with biofilm accumulation creates ideal breeding conditions. Moisture from bathrooms, kitchens, and basement drains attracts these pests, making regular drain maintenance essential.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Astoria?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Astoria properties take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and number of affected drains. Our technicians inspect all potential breeding sites, apply bio-enzymatic treatments to break down organic matter, and may use additional methods for severe cases. Follow-up visits may be recommended for complete elimination.

faqs.question: Is drain fly treatment safe for my Astoria apartment or restaurant?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments use EPA-approved products that are safe for residential and commercial use. We employ bio-enzymatic cleaners and targeted applications that effectively eliminate drain flies without harming your family, pets, or customers. All treatments comply with NYC health and safety regulations.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 drain fly treatment price?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and potential breeding sites, application of professional-grade bio-enzymatic treatments, mechanical cleaning when necessary, and prevention recommendations. Pricing varies based on property size, number of drains affected, and infestation severity. We provide free estimates for all Astoria properties.
